title: Timeline - Improve name visibility for long & short items

posts.author: sergei_safrigin (Sergei Safrigin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you have long items on your timeline view?

timeline sticky name1732×868 1.9 MB

To make the Timeline and Gantt usage easier and clearer, and to assure you always know what the lines represent, we changed the way the text appears on the view!

If you have really long items, and as you scroll, you still need to see the item name, it will now follow wherever you go.

If you have really short items, you no longer need to hover to see their name:

timeline name cutoff1694×532 27.6 KB

Enjoy and share your feedback!!
